name: HMS Lurcher (FY 347)
events: 4 Feb 1943 HrMs O 21 (Lt.Cdr. J.F. van Dulm, RNN) conducted A/S exercises of Diego Suarez with HMIS Khyber (Lt. B.S. Soma, RIN), HMS Lurched (T/Lt. J. Muir, RNVR) and HMS Mastiff (T/Lt. C.M. Motherwell, RNVR). (1)
5 Feb 1943 HrMs O 21 (Lt.Cdr. J.F. van Dulm, RNN) conducted A/S exercises of Diego Suarez with HMS Lurched (T/Lt. J. Muir, RNVR) and HMS Mastiff ((T/Lt. C.M. Motherwell, RNVR). (1)
6 Feb 1943 HrMs O 21 (Lt.Cdr. J.F. van Dulm, RNN) conducted A/S exercises of Diego Suarez with HMS Lurched (T/Lt. J. Muir, RNVR) and HMS Mastiff ((T/Lt. C.M. Motherwell, RNVR). (1)
